calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-05-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Cause call for petition for name change.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Leticia Perez
Petitioner: Marcela A. Condori
Petitioner was sworn and examined.
The court grants decree changing name to: Marcella Conti
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patty Dowling.
No appearance by the petitioner, matter is ordered off calendar.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-25-2003 Reset To May-06-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: P. Dias/S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: Margaret Del Coto. Petitioner Marcela A. Condori was sworn and examined. Plaintiff's husband states for the record that petitioner is ill and requests a continuance to May 6, 2003. Court grants the request.
